description: Sensor registry — defines automated sensing capabilities, schedules, and targets
purpose: Register all automated discovery sensors (APIs, dashboards, agents) to enable continuous Re-Discovery phase

schema.sensor_type: enum - governance | infrastructure | security | data_quality | stakeholder | cost | performance
schema.target: string - what it monitors: API endpoint, resource group, project set, etc.

schedule.frequency: enum - continuous | hourly | every_6h | daily | weekly | on_demand

schema.output_layer: string - where results are written (typically discovery_signals)
dependencies: string - APIs, tools, MCP servers needed

notes: Sensors run autonomously on schedule (or on-demand) to feed L129. Examples: MTI audit sensor, cost anomaly sensor, project health sensor.
